# FEEDBACK-REQUEST — Ask for Feedback

## When

Use when an artifact is good enough to review but not final.

## Purpose

Get an external signal instead of continuing private refinement.

## Inputs

- Artifact/draft
- Reviewer/contact
- Specific question
- Desired feedback type

## Steps minimum

1. Choose reviewer.
2. State what the artifact is.
3. Ask 1-3 specific questions.
4. Say what kind of feedback is useful.
5. Send.

## Output

Feedback request sent.

## Tick valid when

A real person or channel has been asked for feedback.

## Stop rule

Do not ask for broad vague feedback if a specific question is possible.
